name: oap-email
description: Search, read, and manage cached email. Use for 'check my email', 'any new messages?', 'emails from Jane', 'show urgent emails', 'what needs my attention?'. Messages are categorized (personal, machine, mailing-list, spam, offers) AND prioritized (urgent, important, informational, noise). For briefings, filter by priority='urgent,important'. For 'real emails', use category='personal'. Supports conversational override management: 'mark emails from joe@cpa.us as important', 'treat @facebook.com as noise'.

input.description: JSON with 'action' to select operation. Actions: 'scan' (fetch NEW messages from IMAP — no filters, always imports all new arrivals), 'list' (query already-classified messages — supports priority/category/since/query filters), 'summary' (counts by category and priority), 'get' (single message by id), 'thread' (conversation), 'classify' (re-run classifier on unclassified messages), 'overrides_add' (set sender category/priority override), 'overrides_list' (show all overrides), 'overrides_remove' (delete an override). For briefing tasks: call 'scan' first to import new messages, then call 'list' with priority='urgent,important' to retrieve them. The 'priority', 'category', 'since', and 'query' filters only work with the 'list' action — they are ignored by 'scan'.

since.description: ISO 8601 timestamp — only messages after this time

query.description: Search with OR support and field prefixes. Examples: 'from:amy@netgate.net', 'subject:invoice'. Prefixes: from/sender, to, subject, body.

category.description: Filter by category: 'personal', 'machine', 'mailing-list', 'spam', 'offers'. Omit for all.

priority.description: Filter by priority: 'urgent', 'important', 'informational', 'noise'. Comma-separated for multiple: 'urgent,important'. Use 'urgent,important' for briefings.

override_pattern.description: Email address or @domain for override actions (e.g. 'joe@cpa.us' or '@facebook.com')

override_category.description: Category to force for this sender (personal, machine, etc.)

override_priority.description: Priority to force for this sender (urgent, important, informational, noise)

output.description: Message objects with category, priority, sender info, subject, snippet. Summary returns counts and senders. Override actions return the override record.
